title: Dashboard Personalized Views
excerpt: Hello, I’m wondering if it is currently possible to create a personalized view for a dashboard (much like one might do for a regular board). It would be nice to be able to filter out the many, many columns I do not use o…

posts.author: Rebekah (Rebekah Van Dyk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’m wondering if it is currently possible to create a personalized view for a dashboard (much like one might do for a regular board). It would be nice to be able to filter out the many, many columns I do not use on the boards that filter into my dash.

Thank you
